{{Infobox group
| name = Alchemists
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
}}

''See also: [[Alchemists Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Alchemists are members of a highly influential, wealthy, and well-connected organization known as the [[Guild]] of Alchemists. They are recognized by a standard uniform consisting of stained aprons—often featuring a gold crown symbol—bulging glass goggles, and gloves. While some practitioners are specialized medical alchemists, others focus on areas such as organ processing and storage. [[The Guild]] is known to be accepted in many locations, allowing its members to gain insights into the workings of various other guilds. The practitioners utilize a wide array of tools and substances, including syringes, potions, pills, solutions, gases, and explosives. Their work ranges from medical treatments—such as administering intravenous fluids to increase physical strength or reaction time—to the creation of specialized combat equipment like modified pistols with integrated smoking bottles. They also employ tactical methods involving adhesives, darts, and various gases to immobilize or restrain opponents. Some alchemists are even known to use expensive, difficult-to-produce solutions capable of turning a person inside out. Beyond science and medicine, alchemists possess significant social and political power. [[The Guild]] can mobilize various groups of workers for large-scale operations, and its members may serve as private security or part of a specialized force. While many are dedicated to their craft, the [[Guild]] has also been known to exile members based on personality rather than skill. Their research is so potent that long-term use of certain potions can permanently alter a person's physiology in a manner similar to surgery.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Alchemists]] wear glass-eyed masks and long, stained aprons.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c8">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Alchemists]] are part of the Independent alliance.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The alchemists have a fortune that may sway public opinion.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Alchemists]] perform testing involving potions and injections.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c9">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The alchemists are one of the four [[Independent Guilds]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c4">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The alchemists are moving, funded by [[Bareius]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c5">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The alchemists play a vital support role for the [[Guilds]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Alchemists]] are a type of Independent.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c10">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
